title: banksia dallanneyi subsp. media
intro: Banksia dallanneyi subsp. media is a subspecies of shrub within the Banksia plant genus, native to Western Australia, characterized by its distinctive yellow and brown inflorescences. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Banksia dallanneyi subsp. media include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in combination with other herbs to create a remedy for various ailments.
